creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Wen,

thanks a lot for committing my other (much more relevant) change to this port! I think you might want to close the other PR was well? I could do that myself, but I'm not sure I can add the "Resolution: FIXED" property it deserves.

As for *this* change, please take it as a mere suggestion, the old WWW url is fine as it links to the new one, it's just the text on the old site might be a bit misleading. So, sorry I'm nagging you *again* -- and thanks for maintaining a port that's very important for anyone using FreeBSD as a cross-dev platform for e.g. the C64 (which includes me) :)

Cheers, Felix
